youtube_upload_video.description: Upload a video file to YouTube with metadata. Handles resumable upload (init + file stream) in a single step.

title.title: Video Title
title.description: Title for the uploaded video (max 100 characters)

body_source_url.title: Video File URL
body_source_url.description: URL to the video file to upload

madeForKids.title: Made for Kids
madeForKids.description: Declare whether this video is made for kids. YouTube legally requires this declaration. Setting this to true limits features like personalized ads, comments, and notifications.

categoryId.title: Category ID
categoryId.description: YouTube video category ID (22 = People & Blogs)

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: MIME type of the video file

publishAt.title: Publish At
publishAt.description: Schedule the video to auto-publish at this time. Only works when Privacy Status is 'private'. The video will automatically become public at the specified time. Use ISO 8601 format.

defaultLanguage.title: Default Language
defaultLanguage.description: The language of the video's default metadata (title, description). Use BCP-47 language codes (e.g., 'en', 'es', 'fr', 'de', 'ja').

defaultAudioLanguage.title: Default Audio Language
defaultAudioLanguage.description: The language spoken in the video's audio. Use BCP-47 language codes (e.g., 'en', 'es', 'fr', 'de', 'ja').

recordingDate.title: Recording Date
recordingDate.description: The date and time when the video was recorded.

notifySubscribers.title: Notify Subscribers
notifySubscribers.description: Whether to send a notification to subscribers about the new video. Set to false for bulk uploads or test videos to avoid spamming subscribers.

embeddable.title: Embeddable
embeddable.description: Whether the video can be embedded on other websites.

publicStatsViewable.title: Public Stats Viewable
publicStatsViewable.description: Whether the extended video statistics on the watch page are publicly viewable.

example_parameters.title: My Awesome Video
example_parameters.description: Check out this video! Like and subscribe for more content.

youtube_set_thumbnail.description: Upload a custom thumbnail image for a YouTube video.

videoId.title: Video ID
videoId.description: The YouTube video ID to set the thumbnail for

body_source_url.title: Thumbnail Image URL
body_source_url.description: URL to the thumbnail image file (JPEG, PNG, GIF, BMP — max 2MB)

youtube_list_videos.description: Get videos from the authenticated user's YouTube channel with statistics

pageToken.title: Page Token
pageToken.description: Token for fetching the next page of results

youtube_get_video.description: Retrieve detailed information, statistics, and content details for a specific YouTube video

youtube_search.description: Search for videos, channels, or playlists on YouTube

q.title: Search Query
q.description: The search term to look for

type.title: Resource Type
type.description: Type of resource to search for

pageToken.title: Page Token
pageToken.description: Token for the next page of results

youtube_list_channels.description: Get channel details and statistics for the authenticated user's YouTube channels

youtube_list_playlists.description: Get playlists owned by the authenticated user's YouTube channel

pageToken.title: Page Token
pageToken.description: Token for the next page of results

youtube_update_video.description: Update the title, description, tags, or privacy status of an existing YouTube video

video_id.title: Video ID
video_id.description: The YouTube video ID to update

id.title: Video ID
id.description: The YouTube video ID to delete

youtube_create_playlist.description: Create a new playlist on the authenticated user's YouTube channel

example_parameters.title: My Playlist
example_parameters.description: A collection of my favorite videos.

youtube_add_to_playlist.description: Add a video to an existing YouTube playlist

playlistId.title: Playlist ID
playlistId.description: The ID of the playlist to add the video to

videoId.title: Video ID
videoId.description: The YouTube video ID to add

youtube_remove_from_playlist.description: Remove an item from a YouTube playlist by its playlist item ID

id.title: Playlist Item ID
id.description: The playlist item ID to remove (not the video ID)

youtube_list_comments.description: Retrieve comment threads on a YouTube video

videoId.title: Video ID
videoId.description: The YouTube video ID to get comments for

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Number of comment threads to return (1-100)

pageToken.title: Page Token
pageToken.description: Token for the next page of results

youtube_post_comment.description: Post a new top-level comment on a YouTube video

videoId.title: Video ID
videoId.description: The YouTube video ID to comment on

text.title: Comment Text
text.description: The text of the comment to post

youtube_reply_to_comment.description: Post a reply to an existing YouTube comment

parentId.title: Parent Comment ID
parentId.description: The ID of the comment to reply to
